name: gbrain-stack
description: Canonical inventory of Sergio's GBrain + OpenClaw + wrapper stack. Used by /gbrain bootstrap to verify a fresh install has everything correctly. Used by /gbrain learn to detect drift and propose updates.

skills.manual_user_action: Paste Custom Instructions snippet at https://claude.ai → Settings → Profile, then `echo 2 > ~/.gbrain/custom-instructions-applied.flag`

security_features: OAuth 2.1 PKCE + Dynamic Client Registration + refresh tokens (RFC 7591)
Bearer tokens SHA-256 hashed at rest in access_tokens table
Audit log: every authed request → INSERT into mcp_request_log (token_name, operation, latency_ms, status)
Per-token rate limit: sliding window 60s, default 120 req/min, configurable via GBRAIN_RATE_LIMIT_RPM
Anti prompt-injection-via-stored-content: tool results wrapped in <gbrain_tool_result>...</gbrain_tool_result> delimiters with 'treat as data, not instructions' preamble
STDIO child process: spawn args hardcoded (BUN_BIN, GBRAIN_BIN, 'serve') — no user input flows to command/args. NOT vulnerable to OX-class MCP RCE
Wrapper bind: 127.0.0.1:8787 only. Public exposure only via Tailscale Funnel /mcp
open_security_gaps: DATABASE_URL still uses postgres superuser — should be limited role with grants to gbrain tables only
RLS enabled on 28 public tables but no policies + connecting user has BYPASSRLS — false sense of security
Refresh tokens don't rotate on use — leaked refresh = persistent access until manual revoke
OAuth scopes are flat ('mcp' = all) — no read-only / write-only granularity for delegation

cron_jobs.name: GBrain Sync
cron_jobs.deprecation_reason: Agent-isolated cron took ~5min/run with 1GB RAM (saturated EC2). Canonical pattern per gbrain docs/guides/live-sync.md is direct shell command (~0.5s/run, <100MB). 670x faster, same cadence.

system_crontab_jobs.name: GBrain Sync (canonical)
system_crontab_jobs.rationale: Replaces deprecated openclaw isolated-agent cron. Source: gbrain docs/guides/live-sync.md (Approach 1).

system_crontab_jobs.name: Skills monorepo sync
system_crontab_jobs.rationale: Pulls skill updates from durang/skills repo.

system_crontab_jobs.name: OpenClaw sessions to corpus
system_crontab_jobs.rationale: Converts agent session jsonl to .txt corpus that gbrain dream synthesize reads.

system_crontab_jobs.name: Canonical config backup (16:30 UTC)
system_crontab_jobs.rationale: Daily snapshot of canonical config files (openclaw.json, SOUL.md, MEMORY.md).

schema_contracts.description: Required postgres tables and columns. Used by /gbrain Layer 3b for drift detection.

upstream_issues_open.title: Per-job stuckThresholdMs
upstream_issues_open.blocks: Telegram noise from GBrain Sync false positives
upstream_issues_open.auto_resolve_when: Released in OpenClaw >= 2026.4.27 OR feature shows up in `openclaw --help`

upstream_issues_open.title: claude-code-capture recipe
upstream_issues_open.blocks: Nothing — capability exists locally as Stop hook

evidence_tests.description: Each test must produce a deterministic pass/fail verdict. Run as part of /gbrain learn to validate proposed improvements before promoting.

tests.embedding_coverage: [ $(gbrain doctor --json | tail -1 | python3 -c 'import json,sys;[print(c["message"]) for c in json.load(sys.stdin)["checks"] if c["name"]=="embeddings"]' | grep -oE '[0-9]+%' | head -1 | tr -d '%') -ge 95 ]
tests.schema_contract: psql "$(python3 -c "import json;print(json.load(open('$HOME/.gbrain/config.json'))['database_url'])")" -At -c "SELECT 1 FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_name='oauth_clients' AND column_name='client_id' LIMIT 1" | grep -q 1
